notes: Lesson 13 orientation (act 76), 1039.87s, 7 route-aligned content cues re-placed from the real spiral overview transcript (High-level map / Analogy / Tiny example / Mechanism / Implementation / Misconception / Synthesis), specialized to the actual NEXT-TOKEN-PREDICTION content and reusing the transformer.py idiom lib (token_row, hidden_matrix, vector_strip, logit_bars, ranking_list). Running example 'The cat' -> final hidden state h -> logits (sat highest) -> softmax P(sat)=0.64 -> sample -> append -> repeat. Two review iterations. Round-1: smoke-rendered every cue final frame with manim -s (fast safe-area/import guard) and caught+fixed 4 layout issues before any long render: (1) Cue01 workshop stations overflowed the right then left safe edge -> retuned obj/station widths and x positions; (2) Cue03 closing note overran the bottom safe area (buff 0.4 -> 0.55); (3) Cue04 closing note overran the bottom (buff 0.4 -> 0.55) AND P(sat)=0.64 collided with it -> anchored P(sat) under the ranking via next_to; (4) Cue06 generation-step Transform left ghosted/overlapping same-position text -> switched to FadeOut/FadeIn. Round-2: full -ql render + READ start/mid/end for all 7 cues; caught one remaining defect: Cue06 SIMULTANEOUS FadeOut+FadeIn crossfaded two same-position generation lines and a mid-transition frame showed ghosted glyphs -> changed to SEQUENTIAL fade-out-then-fade-in, re-rendered chunk 6 (--cue 6, trimmed to 148.553s), and re-verified via accurate-seek frames at 958s ('The cat sat on' -> predict 'the', single clean line) and 1035s ('The cat sat on the' -> predict 'mat' + all 5 perspective cards lit). Per-cue checklist (formula/label legibility+correctness, highlighted element matches the beat narration, contrast, nothing off-frame/overlapping via theme.guard, chunk timing within pinning tolerance): all pass. Note: cue04/cue05 'end' frames are sampled exactly at the cue boundary with fast keyframe seeking and show the next cue's opening title (documented cumulative chunk-pinning artifact, same as Lesson 12); each cue's true final state was validated by the manim -s last-frame guard render and, for cue06, by accurate-seek extraction. Final -ql 1039.804s vs audio 1039.87s (delta 0.066s). Per-cue: Cue0: 'The cat' -> final hidden state h -> route h/output-head/logits/softmax/probs/token with a loop-back 'append the token, then predict again'. | Cue1: the pipeline as a workshop line: hidden state -> Transformer(mix context) -> Output head(score every word) -> Softmax(scores->probs) -> Sample(pick one token), each station stamps a receipt; tags transformers/logits/softmax name the stations. | Cue2: follow 'The cat'; the LAST position's hidden state (amber-highlighted row) is the model's summary of the prompt so far and is turned into 'what is the next word?'. | Cue3: z = W h; the output head W has one row per vocab word (the/cat/sat/mat/dog/ran), a row-scan shows each row dotted with h giving one raw logit; logit_bars show 'sat' tallest (EMERALD) -> logits are raw, unbounded scores, not yet probabilities. | Cue4: softmax p_i = exp(z_i)/sum_j exp(z_j) turns the raw logits into a ranked distribution (sat 0.64, mat 0.17, ran 0.10, dog 0.04, the 0.03, cat 0.02 -> sums to 1); read off P(sat)=0.64; argmax picks the top, sampling can pick others. Softmax math verified consistent with the displayed logits. | Cue5: four tempting mix-ups as A != B (a logit != a probability, high probability != certainty, argmax != the only choice, a phase name != the operation), revealed one at a time with a per-pair why-note. | Cue6: the prediction map returns (h->logits->softmax->token) with an append loop-back; the context grows one predicted token at a time ('The cat' -> sat -> on -> the -> mat) and five perspective cards (Audio/Visual/Text/Code/Assess) light one at a time.
